DP.145.0000:
Whoa, whoa, whoa! What have we here?
You are so not Team Galactic!\r
And you’re a little kid to boot!\f
Those things we made with the energy
we took from the Valley Windworks\r
are already in Pastoria City.\f
Huh?
That’s not what this is about?
DP.145.0001:
Whoa, whoa, whoa! What have we here?
You are so not Team Galactic!\f
And you’re a little kid!
Ummm... Are you maybe a visitor?\f
If you’re a visitor, you can get to
our HQ by taking those stairs.\f
Huh?
That’s not what this is about?
DP.145.0002:
Whoa, whoa, whoa! Hold it there!
Do you have the key?\f
I don’t know if you do or not, but
a Storage Key is safe with our guard\r
in front of the HQ.\f
Huh?
That’s not what this is about?
DP.145.0003:
Whoa, whoa, whoa!
What’s going on here?\f
All my fellow Team Galactic members
have disappeared!\f
But nobody relieved me from guarding
the warehouse, so I’m staying put!\f
Huh?
That’s not what this is about?
DP.145.0004:
The rust-encrusted door is locked.
It appears to take a special key.
DP.145.0005:
The rust-encrusted door is locked.
It appears to take a special key.\f
Use the Storage Key?
DP.145.0006:
[0103,0000] inserted and turned the
Storage Key.\f
The rusty door creaked open!\f
The Storage Key snapped off inside
the keyhole...
